programs.title: Mayfair Witches
programs.desc: Rowan desperately partners with Cortland to try to stop Lasher; Moira assists Sip in capturing him.

programs.title: Dead & Beautiful
programs.desc: A group of young and spoiled rich kids turn into vampires after a night out, changing the course of their lives.

programs.title: Habit
programs.desc: A self-destructive alcoholic (Larry Fessenden) becomes obsessed with a woman (Meredith Snaider) he met at a party and later learns she is a vampire.

programs.title: Firebite
programs.desc: When an Aboriginal man is kidnapped by vampires and a traditional vampire hunter goes missing, renegade fighters Tyson and Shanika realize there's some serious trouble going on in their town and they're the only ones that can help their community.

programs.title: Firebite
programs.desc: After finding the missing Blood Hunter and saving his life, Tyson and Shanika learn that the Vampire King has arrived in town; but after finding out about Tyson's past, Shanika starts questioning the truth about the night her mother went missing.

programs.title: Firebite
programs.desc: Tyson and Shanika arrive home to find Jalingbirri dead and their home destroyed by the Vampire King; Tyson wants to run. but Shanika vows to go down in the tunnels to find out if her mother is alive and being kept as a bleeder.
